# Kalyanasuthra Matrimony

> South India's trusted matrimony service for Telugu, Tamil and Kannada families. Verified profiles and dedicated relationship managers help families find compatible matches.

## Pages

- [Home](/): About Kalyanasuthra, featured profiles, success stories, services and contact.
- [Membership Plans](/membership-plans): Online, Support and Affluent matrimony packages with pricing.
- [Register](/register): Create a new matrimony profile.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy)
